merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Morning Coffee Repress - Vinyl Limited Edition
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: The ultimate Limited Edition double LP repress of "Morning Coffee" is finally here ! Treat yourself to this ultra-exclusive double LP featuring an incredible liquid-filled vinyl. It is the perfect opportunity to acquire an exceptional collector's piece that is as hypnotic to watch as it is to listen to. Vinyl Features Ultra-Rare Liquid-Filled Disc 1 : Much more than just a vinyl record, it's a technical marvel. This first disc contains a moving, coffee-colored liquid that comes alive to the rhythm of your turntable, offering a hypnotic and extremely rare visual experience. Stunning Coffee-Marbled Disc 2 : To perfectly pair with the liquid disc, enjoy a beautiful brown marbled vinyl that captures the warm aesthetic of a freshly brewed cup of coffee. 22 Remastered Tracks : Enjoy 54 minutes of carefully selected, soothing melodies, remastered to bring a gentle warmth to your morning coffee routines. Specially designed for fans who couldn't secure the original first pressing due to its instant sell-out, this limited reissue is the missing centerpiece your collection deserves. Technical Specifications Format : 2 × 12" Vinyl (Double LP) Speed : 33 1/3 RPM Duration : 00:54:00 (22 tracks) Series : Special Limited Repress Audio : High-Fidelity Vinyl Master (Stereo) ️ Please Note : Due to the handcrafted and unique nature of these vinyl records, colors and shades may vary slightly from the preview images for both vinyls. Shipping & Quality Details Status : Limited Edition (Pre-order). Shipping : Early September 2026 Collector-Grade Packaging : Housed in a premium heavyweight gatefold jacket with enhanced artwork, complete with anti-static archival inner sleeves to guarantee pristine preservation. Authenticity : 100% Official Store Exclusive Release.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Morning Coffee Repress - Vinyl Limited Edition, Limited shipping areas , from Lofi Girl

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Lofi Girl Essentials T-Shirt L
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Lofi Girl Essentials t-shirt with minimalist design. Soft, comfortable cotton for everyday wear. Premium quality apparel. Official Lofi Girl merchandise.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Lofi Girl Essentials T-Shirt L, Unavailable, limited delivery , from Lofi Girl

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Spring Collection 2026 – Seasons Vinyls Part 1
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Turn over a new leaf and embrace the gentle rhythm of the season. The opening chapter of our 2026 Seasons Collection has arrived. This curated compilation captures the very essence of spring, the sound of blooming nature, soft sunlight, and the quiet joy of a fresh start. Featuring hours of cozy spring lofi and gentle chill music, this record is your dedicated companion to help you relax, reset, and find your flow during your daily rituals. Vinyl Features A Seasonal Journey : The first installment of a limited four-part series celebrating the 2026 cycle. Collect all four seasonal releases to align their covers and reveal a stunning, continuous panoramic illustration. Curated Soundscape : An extensive selection of 28 tracks specifically mastered for an optimal analog listening experience. Exclusive Visuals : Features original seasonal artwork on a premium gatefold sleeve, designed to be displayed as a piece of art in your home. Immersive Atmosphere : The perfect backdrop for focused study sessions, morning coffee, or simply unwinding after a long day. Technical Specifications Format : Double Vinyl 2 × 12" Speed : 33 1/3 RPM Duration : 01:00:00 (28 tracks) Series : Official Release #43 (2026 Seasons Collection #01) Audio : Features world-class lofi artists, including xander., kainbeats, and many more. ️ Please Note : Due to the handcrafted and unique nature of these vinyl records, colors and shades may vary slightly from the preview images. Shipping & Quality Details Official Release Date : April 9th, 2026. Estimated Shipping Date : August 2026. Collector-Grade Packaging : Each record is shipped in a reinforced, eco-friendly mailer with protective padding to ensure it arrives in mint condition. Authenticity : Official Lofi Girl product.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Spring Collection 2026 – Seasons Vinyls Part 1, Limited shipping areas , from Lofi Girl

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Lofi Girl Backpack
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Official Lofi Girl backpack with iconic artwork. Durable, spacious design perfect for school, work, or travel. Premium quality materials. Shop the Lofi Girl collection.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Lofi Girl Backpack, Limited shipping areas , from Lofi Girl

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Lofi Girl x Assassin's Creed: Shadows Collaboration Vinyl
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Lofi Girl x Assassin's Creed: Shadows vinyl collaboration. Premium pressing with exclusive game-inspired beats. Limited edition. Official Lofi Girl merch.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Lofi Girl x Assassin's Creed: Shadows Collaboration Vinyl, Unavailable, limited delivery , from Lofi Girl

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Spring Edition - Notebook
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Elevate your focus with this exclusive Lofi-Inspired Spring Notebook. This Notebook is your invitation to slow down, put your headphones on, and let your creativity bloom alongside the season. Inspired by the cozy, focused aesthetic of Lofi culture, our exclusive Spring edition features a unique illustration that captures that perfect moment of quiet inspiration at your desk. It’s not just a place for notes—it’s a companion for your late-night study sessions and sun-drenched morning journaling, designed to turn every thought into a masterpiece. ️ Crafted for Your Creative Flow In true Lofi fashion, we’ve prioritized a tactile experience that helps you stay in the "zone" without distractions: A Protective Canvas : The 157 gsm hard-coated cover keeps your art safe, featuring an exclusive seasonal design that brings a touch of calm to your workspace. The Perfect Ink Glide : Filled with 100 sheets of 80 gsm paper, providing a smooth, bleed-resistant surface that feels as satisfying as your favorite chill beat. Structured Simplicity : Simple lined inner pages offer a clean, minimalist layout, perfect for everything from aesthetic journaling to organized task lists. Your Portable Studio : The A5 format is the ideal size to carry from your bedroom desk to your favorite local café. Technical Summary Size : A5 Paper : 80 gsm (Inner) / 157 gsm (Cover) Volume : 100 Lined Sheets Style : Hard Coated Protective Finish Vibe : Limited Spring / Lofi Aesthetic Ready to start your next deep-work session ? Grab this exclusive piece of the Spring Collection and let the music and your ideas flow.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Spring Edition - Notebook, Limited shipping areas , from Lofi Girl

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Lofi Girl Essentials Hoodie L
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: Lofi Girl Essentials hoodie with minimalist design. Soft, cozy fleece perfect for comfort and style. Premium quality apparel. Official Lofi Girl merchandise.
merchandiseItemRenderer.accessibilityTitle: Lofi Girl Essentials Hoodie L, Limited shipping areas , from Lofi Girl
